name: Beijing Tianli Mobile Service Integration, Inc.
summary: Beijing Tianli Mobile Service Integration, Inc. provides integrated solutions for mobile information systems in China. The company offers mobile information application solutions, including customized development, business integration, operational support, and customer relationship management services, as well as SMS, MMS application, and cloud platform-based mobile information services to large and medium-sized group customers. It also provides Internet finance and insurance services; and software custom development, terminal equipment, operation support, and comprehensive consulting services. Beijing Tianli Mobile Service Integration, Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
